mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO order_item( order_id, coffee_id, coffee_name, coffee_image, price, quantity, total_price, create_time, sweet, temperature ) VALUES # foreach：循环标签 # collection="list"：要循环的集合，这里就是方法参数里的List # item="item"：循环中的每个元素起名为 item # separator=","：每循环一次，用逗号分隔
( #{item.orderId}, #{item.coffeeId}, #{item.coffeeName}, #{item.coffeeImage}, #{item.price}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.totalPrice}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.sweet}, #{item.temperature} )
